notes: Re-ran Salva find_partnership_signals objective post scoring-layer bug fix; result unchanged from prior arm: qualified_count still 0 (raw_count 5, all raw candidates rejected as low_signal/untrusted_source). Notably noise_domains flagged en.wikipedia.org, www.intel.com, www.amd.com, www.mediatek.com, www.hp.com as untrusted despite being highly relevant official/reference sources -- consistent with the known QualificationScorer over-rejection issue (see project memory: 'QualificationScorer 61% 測試回傳零實體是最高槓桿修復點'). The fix targeting find_partnership_signals did not resolve this case. Fell back to WebSearch (2 queries) to answer the question directly; findings synthesized from MediaTek's own blog plus independent tech press, cross-checked for consistency.
